title: pelargonium × perigraphon
intro: Pelargonium × perigraphon, also known as Red Form or the Cape Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Pelargonium genus, native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds that can help soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Pelargonium × perigraphon include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
